name: Webhook
webhookUrlDesc: The destination URL for the HTTP request.
tlsVerificationDesc: Verify the SSL/TLS certificate of the destination endpoint. Disable only for trusted internal networks.
headersJsonDesc: Custom HTTP headers defined as a JSON object.
payloadTemplateDesc: The payload sent in the request body. Variables like {title}, {message}, and {severity} will be replaced. Use {custom_fields.your_key} for custom fields. Values will be escaped for JSON injection if necessary.
payloadPreviewDesc: Example payload generated from your template.
